title: SEC Meeting With Senate Committee On Finance
description: L-R   Head External Relations Securities and Exchange Commission  Mr Mohammed Bagudu,  Head Accounts SEC Mr Abubakar Gaya, Director General SEC Mr Lamido Yuguda and   Executive Commissioner  Corporate
html: L-R   Head External Relations Securities and Exchange Commission  Mr Mohammed Bagudu,  Head Accounts SEC Mr Abubakar Gaya, Director General SEC Mr Lamido Yuguda and   Executive Commissioner  Corporate Services SEC Mr Ibrahim Boyi during a Meeting between the SEC and Senate Committee on Finance at the National Assembly Abuja yesterday.
